en_title: 'Below Any Reasonable Standard': Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced Developers Fighting to Save Jobs, Secure Fair Severance Pay at Ubisoft Barcelona
cn_title: 育碧《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》开发者抗议遣散费「远低于合理标准」
subtitle: 巴塞罗那员工罢工维权
opus_summary: 育碧巴塞罗那计划裁减最多51人并将团队限制在《彩虹六号》项目，员工称初步遣散方案远低于合理标准，正通过罢工争取保住岗位与公平补偿。

paragraphs.en: Striking staff at Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced co-developer Ubisoft Barcelona have slammed the company's initial severance pay offer as "below any resonable standard," after employees were told that up to 51 jobs were being eliminated.
paragraphs.cn: 在员工被告知最多将裁减51个岗位后，参与开发《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》的育碧巴塞罗那罢工员工抨击公司初步遣散方案「远低于任何合理标准」。

paragraphs.en: Layoffs at Ubisoft Barcelona were announced last month as part of a wider wave of job losses across the firm. 380 staff are being let go in this latest downsizing, spread across Ubisoft offices in Winnipeg and Belgrade (which will close completely), in Barcelona, and in the company's global publishing division.
paragraphs.cn: 育碧上月宣布巴塞罗那裁员，这是公司更大范围裁员潮的一部分。本轮缩减将裁掉380名员工，涉及育碧温尼伯、将彻底关闭的贝尔格莱德办公室、巴塞罗那办公室及公司全球发行部门。

paragraphs.en: At Ubisoft Barcelona, up to 51 jobs have been placed at risk as Ubisoft plans to cut the team's size and restrict it to working just on the Rainbow Six franchise in future, IGN understands.
paragraphs.cn: IGN了解到，育碧计划缩减巴塞罗那团队规模，并让其今后只参与《彩虹六号》系列，因此最多51个岗位面临风险。

paragraphs.en: The plight of Barcelona's staff has sparked headlines, with the likely job losses contrasted against the commercial success of Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced, which sold an impressive 2 million copies in just 24 hours. While development on Resynced was led by Ubisoft Singapore, Barcelona contributed significantly to the title. It has previously been reported that the company handled Resynced's underwater diving side-missions, though IGN understands that the studio also developed a swathe of other locations, quests, and contracts.
paragraphs.cn: 巴塞罗那员工的处境登上新闻，因为可能发生的裁员与《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》的商业成功形成鲜明对比：该作仅24小时便售出200万份。虽然本作由育碧新加坡主导开发，巴塞罗那也作出了重要贡献。此前有报道称该团队负责水下潜水支线任务，IGN了解到，工作室还开发了大量其他地点、任务和合约。

paragraphs.en: Several main quests were handled by Barcelona's Assassin's Creed team during more than two years of Resynced development, including reportedly several showcased during pre-release hands-on previews, alongside development on a specific in-game region (Gibara), plus work on enemy combat AI and bosses.
paragraphs.cn: 在本作超过两年的开发期内，巴塞罗那《刺客信条》团队负责多个主线任务，据称包括发售前试玩中展示的若干任务，同时还开发了特定游戏区域Gibara，并参与敌人战斗AI和首领设计。

paragraphs.en: Yesterday, as negotiations began to save some roles and secure fair severance pay for those leaving, remaining Ubisoft Barcelona staff joined a strike with around 90 people in attendance. Photos from the walkout show a large banner that reads "Corporate Greed" in the style of "Assassin's Creed," and flags for the CGT (General Confederation of Labor) union.
paragraphs.cn: 昨天，围绕保住部分岗位及为离职者争取公平遣散费的谈判开始后，育碧巴塞罗那现有员工参加罢工，约90人到场。罢工照片显示，现场挂着以《刺客信条》风格书写「企业贪婪」的大型横幅，以及CGT（劳工总联合会）工会旗帜。

paragraphs.en: Now, staff impacted by the planned redundancies have spoken to IGN about the current situation, and said that a further strike will take place tomorrow, Thursday, July 16.
paragraphs.cn: 如今，受计划裁员影响的员工向IGN讲述了当前情况，并表示将在明天7月16日星期四再次罢工。

paragraphs.en: "The severance pay they're offering is far below the minimum expected, and below what they've offered for previously laid off employees from the studio," one Ubisoft Barcelona employee told IGN.
paragraphs.cn: 一名育碧巴塞罗那员工告诉IGN：「他们提出的遣散费远低于最低预期，也低于工作室此前向被裁员工提供的标准。」

paragraphs.en: "There are still discussions about saving some of the jobs, and it's likely that at least some will move to Rainbow Six, but the job positions themselves seem quite definite, and the Assassin's Creed team has been certainly cut."
paragraphs.cn: 「目前仍在讨论保住部分岗位，至少有一些人可能转去《彩虹六号》，但被裁岗位本身似乎已经相当确定，《刺客信条》团队肯定已遭削减。」

paragraphs.en: Ubisoft has cut hundreds of staff and fully closed numerous studios in recent months, with 2026 already off to a brutal start. In January, the company canceled six games including its Prince of Persia: Sands of Time remake and closed two Ubisoft studios completely (Ubisoft Stockholm and Ubisoft Halifax), while making layoffs at its office in Abu Dhabi, at Trials studio RedLynx and at Avatar: Frontiers of Pandora outfit Massive Entertainment. Just a week after that, Ubisoft announced plans to ditch 200 jobs at its company headquarters in Paris , leading to protests within the French capital.
paragraphs.cn: 近几个月育碧已裁掉数百人并彻底关闭多家工作室，2026年开局异常残酷。1月，公司取消包括《波斯王子：时之砂》重制版在内的6款游戏，彻底关闭育碧斯德哥尔摩和育碧哈利法克斯，并在阿布扎比办公室、《特技摩托》工作室RedLynx及《阿凡达：潘多拉边境》开发商Massive Entertainment裁员。仅一周后，育碧又宣布计划在巴黎总部裁掉200个岗位，引发法国首都的抗议。

paragraphs.en: In February, Ubisoft was forced to reassure fans that its long-awaited Splinter Cell remake remained in development after 40 jobs were eliminated at its studio Ubisoft Toronto . Then, in March, Ubisoft confirmed that 105 staff were set to depart veteran Tom Clancy game studio Red Storm Entertainment , as part of a move that downsized the studio permanently, following three previous waves of layoffs at the company since 2022.
paragraphs.cn: 2月，育碧多伦多裁掉40个岗位后，公司不得不向粉丝保证期待已久的《细胞分裂》重制版仍在开发。3月，育碧又确认老牌汤姆·克兰西游戏工作室Red Storm Entertainment将有105名员工离职，这是永久缩减工作室规模的一部分；自2022年以来，该公司此前已经历三轮裁员。

paragraphs.en: "We are aware of the strike action announced at Ubisoft Barcelona and respect employees' right to express their views,” a Ubisoft spokesperson told IGN in a statement today. "Ubisoft has initiated a proposed restructuring of Ubisoft Barcelona as part of broader efforts to reduce costs and focus resources on strategic priorities. Under this proposal, the studio would focus solely on Rainbow Six projects, which may impact up to 51 employees.
paragraphs.cn: 育碧发言人在今天提供给IGN的声明中表示：「我们知悉育碧巴塞罗那宣布的罢工行动，并尊重员工表达观点的权利。作为降低成本、将资源集中于战略重点的整体努力之一，育碧已提出重组巴塞罗那工作室的方案。根据该方案，工作室将只专注于《彩虹六号》项目，最多可能影响51名员工。」

paragraphs.en: "This remains a proposal, and no final decision will be made until the collective consultation process has concluded. We are committed to constructive dialogue with employee representatives and to supporting employees throughout this period."
paragraphs.cn: 「这目前仍是一项提案，在集体协商程序结束前不会作出最终决定。我们致力于与员工代表进行建设性对话，并在此期间为员工提供支持。」

translated_terms.Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced: 《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》
